findings.title: Hardcoded master key and support backdoor code
findings.description: Hardcoded MASTER_KEY and SUPPORT_BACKDOOR constants used for privileged authentication bypass

findings.title: MD5 used for password hashing
findings.description: Passwords hashed with crypto.createHash('md5') which is cryptographically broken for password storage

findings.title: No rate limiting on login endpoint
findings.description: Login endpoint accepts unlimited authentication attempts without rate limiting or account lockout

findings.title: API key bypass in token validation endpoint
findings.description: Token validation endpoint accepts hardcoded MASTER_KEY via apiKey field as valid authentication

findings.title: Support backdoor allows impersonation of any user
findings.description: Hidden support login endpoint with hardcoded escalation code allows creating sessions as any user
